page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 208 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8269CL processors using the x86_64 architecture. With a 1:1 ratio of threads per core, each of the 208 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading resource sharing.

The instance is equipped with 3072.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 14.77 GB of memory per core. This massive memory capacity is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.re6.52xlarge offers high resource density for enterprise-scale workloads that require massive memory footprints and dedicated CPU execution. This hardware profile is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, heavy enterprise resource planning systems, large-scale data caching layers, and memory-intensive data processing workloads.

It contains no local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This high-density memory profile is designed for enterprise workloads requiring massive memory capacities and dedicated compute resources, such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and intensive data caching layers.
